name: encode-toolkit
description: 20 ENCODE API tools + 48 expert skills for genomics research. Search experiments, download files with MD5 verification, run pipelines, and cross-reference 14 databases.

tools.name: encode_search_experiments
tools.description: Search ENCODE experiments with 20+ filters including assay type, organism, organ, biosample, target, and more.

tools.name: encode_get_experiment
tools.description: Get full details for a specific experiment including all files, quality metrics, and audit info.

tools.name: encode_list_files
tools.description: List files for a specific experiment with format/type filters.

tools.name: encode_search_files
tools.description: Search files across all experiments with combined experiment + file filters.

tools.name: encode_download_files
tools.description: Download specific files by accession to a local directory with MD5 verification.

tools.name: encode_get_metadata
tools.description: List valid filter values for any search parameter.

tools.name: encode_batch_download
tools.description: Search + download files in one step with preview mode.

tools.name: encode_manage_credentials
tools.description: Store, check, or clear ENCODE credentials for restricted data access.

tools.name: encode_get_facets
tools.description: Get live counts from ENCODE showing what data exists for given filters.

tools.name: encode_get_file_info
tools.description: Get detailed metadata for a single file.

tools.name: encode_track_experiment
tools.description: Track an experiment locally with publications, methods, and pipeline info.

tools.name: encode_list_tracked
tools.description: List all tracked experiments with metadata and publication counts.

tools.name: encode_get_citations
tools.description: Get publications for tracked experiments. Export as BibTeX or RIS.

tools.name: encode_compare_experiments
tools.description: Analyze whether two experiments are compatible for combined analysis.

tools.name: encode_log_derived_file
tools.description: Log derived files for provenance tracking back to ENCODE source data.

tools.name: encode_get_provenance
tools.description: View provenance chains from derived files to source ENCODE data.

tools.name: encode_export_data
tools.description: Export tracked experiments as CSV, TSV, or JSON with PMIDs for cross-referencing.

tools.name: encode_summarize_collection
tools.description: Get grouped statistics of your tracked experiment collection.

tools.name: encode_link_reference
tools.description: Link external references (PubMed, bioRxiv, ClinicalTrials, GEO) to experiments.

tools.name: encode_get_references
tools.description: Get external references linked to experiments for cross-server workflows.
